content: LLMs hallucinate 50-82% of responses on domain-specific factual queries. In sports/health coaching contexts, hallucinated numbers (FTP, TSS, zones) look plausible and are hard to detect. Guardrail pattern: tool-use-only for all numeric outputs; system prompt constraint alone insufficient — must be enforced at parsing layer by rejecting any assistant message containing numeric physiological outputs not preceded by a tool_result block.
